'''Convoy LMC-55c''' was a small fleet of ships owned by the [[Lant Mining Corporation]]. Its flagship was [[LMC Hauler One-Six]] and the convoy included a small [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] escort which protected the fleet.

The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] ships were destroyed, and the corporation convoy was captured by a squadron of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] led by [[Riane]].
